response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal audio phonetically matches the Japanese reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was fully utilized for lyric spelling and translation. The performer summoned was Suzuki Konomi (original singer of 'Redo') rather than Hoshimachi Suisei, so the translation and transcription adjusted accordingly. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle timings are tightly synchronized to the actual vocal delivery, avoiding delayed triggers. The MC talk segment was transcribed manually to match AZKi's spoken words.

subtitles.original: なんと、全部、AZKiの魔力になっちゃった！
subtitles.english: Wow, everything's turned into AZKi's mana!

subtitles.original: 見てください、どうですか？
subtitles.english: Take a look, how is it?

subtitles.original: 尻尾、尻尾も生えてるんです。
subtitles.english: A tail, I even have a tail now.

subtitles.original: ふりふりふりふり、どうですか？
subtitles.english: Wiggle, wiggle, wiggle, wiggle. How is it?

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、今回は、えー、小悪魔衣装を仕立てていただきました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So this time, I had a little devil outfit tailored!

subtitles.original: どうでしょうか？どうでしょうか？
subtitles.english: What do you think? What do you think?

subtitles.original: 魔力？魔王？小悪魔です。
subtitles.english: Magic power? Demon Lord? No, a little devil.

subtitles.original: はい、今回の新衣装はこちらの小悪魔衣装。可愛いでしょ？たくさんスクショも撮ってくださいね！
subtitles.english: Yes, my new outfit is this little devil outfit. Cute, right? Please take lots of screenshots!

subtitles.original: ということで、この衣装でね、せっかくなので、あの曲を歌っていきたいなと思います！
subtitles.english: Since I'm wearing this outfit, I'd love to sing *that* song!

subtitles.original: もしかしたらね、小悪魔ですから、この姿なら、魔法とかも使えちゃうんじゃないのかな？
subtitles.english: After all, since I'm a little devil, maybe I can even use magic in this form!

subtitles.original: ということで、ではですね、次の曲、聴いてください！
subtitles.english: So without further ado, please listen to the next song!

subtitles.original: 召喚！
subtitles.english: Summon!

subtitles.original: 自分の過去に囚われ迷って
subtitles.english: Caught in the trap of my own past, I'm lost

subtitles.original: そうじゃないよと言い聞かせて 全てを
subtitles.english: Just telling myself it's not like that, everything...

subtitles.original: 自由に操れるかなんて
subtitles.english: Will I ever be able to control it freely?

subtitles.original: 分からないよと空は霞んで 正解はどこ？
subtitles.english: I don't know, the sky is hazy. Where is the answer?

subtitles.original: 僕の手のひらに残る大事なもの
subtitles.english: This important thing remains in the palm of my hand

subtitles.original: 忘れない記憶 何度でも
subtitles.english: Unforgettable memories, again and again

subtitles.original: 君を守り抜くと叫んで
subtitles.english: Screaming that I will protect you to the end

subtitles.original: 巻き戻しの中掴んだ愛はそう
subtitles.english: The love I grasped in the rewinding time...

subtitles.original: 離しはしないから
subtitles.english: ...I won't ever let go of it

subtitles.original: 散りばめた想い 今一度きりの願いへ
subtitles.english: The scattered thoughts lead to a wish made once more

subtitles.original: 次への僕に託したよ
subtitles.english: I've entrusted it to the next me

subtitles.original: いつかの約束 光の道しるべになる
subtitles.english: The promise of someday will become a guiding light

subtitles.original: 誓いをさあ君のため
subtitles.english: Now, for you, I make this vow

subtitles.original: 最期まで
subtitles.english: Until the very end

subtitles.original: 涙さえ力に変えてきっと 描いていた望む未来へ
subtitles.english: Changing even tears into strength, to the future we pictured

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: I will connect us

subtitles.original: 想像を超える事態に狂って
subtitles.english: Going crazy over situations beyond imagination

subtitles.original: 爪を立てては もがき足掻いて心は
subtitles.english: Digging in my claws, struggling and scratching, my heart...

subtitles.original: 人生の過ちをもう何回
subtitles.english: ...how many times must I repeat the mistakes of my life...

subtitles.original: 繰り返しては嫌いになって 泣いてても
subtitles.english: ...and come to hate them, even if I'm crying?

subtitles.original: 君の憧れは いつも輝いてた
subtitles.english: Your longing was always shining

subtitles.original: I'll come back
subtitles.english: I'll come back

subtitles.original: I'll come back
subtitles.english: I'll come back

subtitles.original: To your future
subtitles.english: To your future

subtitles.original: 僕は抗うだろう 運命に
subtitles.english: I will resist destiny

subtitles.original: Breaking out
subtitles.english: Breaking out

subtitles.original: Breaking out
subtitles.english: Breaking out

subtitles.original: Breaking down
subtitles.english: Breaking down

subtitles.original: 諦めちゃいないから
subtitles.english: Because I won't give up

subtitles.original: 結ばれた意思は 独りきりじゃない強さへ
subtitles.english: The joined will moves toward a strength that isn't alone

subtitles.original: 紡いだ糸を手繰り寄せ
subtitles.english: Pulling on the spun threads

subtitles.original: 見つけた瞳は 理想を現実に変える
subtitles.english: The eyes I found will change the ideal into reality

subtitles.original: 世界はそう君のため保存版
subtitles.english: The world is indeed for you

subtitles.original: 最初から
subtitles.english: From the very beginning

subtitles.original: 最初から
subtitles.english: From the very beginning

subtitles.original: 胸に抱いた思い出とずっと あの日から続く決意で
subtitles.english: With the memories in my heart and the resolve from that day

subtitles.original: 飛べるよ Redo
subtitles.english: I can fly, Redo!

subtitles.original: AZKiちゃん生誕祭！まだまだ行けますか！？盛り上がっていこう！
subtitles.english: AZKi's Birthday Festival! Can you keep going?! Let's get fired up!

subtitles.original: 君がたとえ僕のこと保存版
subtitles.english: Even if you...

subtitles.original: 忘れても
subtitles.english: ...forget about me

subtitles.original: 僕はもう忘れない 誰も傷つけない
subtitles.english: I won't ever forget again, and I won't let anyone get hurt

subtitles.original: 消えそうな過去を 救い出すための時間よ
subtitles.english: This is the time to rescue a past that's fading away

subtitles.original: ここから
subtitles.english: From here...

subtitles.original: 始まれ
subtitles.english: ...let it begin!

subtitles.original: 巡りゆく一瞬を 今一度きりの願いへ
subtitles.english: To the revolving moments, to a wish made once more

subtitles.original: 確かに僕は託された
subtitles.english: I have certainly been entrusted with it

subtitles.original: いつかの約束 光の道しるべになる
subtitles.english: The promise of someday will become a guiding light
